items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #4' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior regarding the OAuth consent screen clarity. However, there is no direct evidence provided that demonstrates the outcome of this scenario or how it aligns with the expected result. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not include any checks or validations related to the OAuth consent screen, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement satisfaction.
